hero.title: isTech
hero.subtitle: B2B Data Engineering Consultancy
hero.description: Expert data engineering consultancy serving US enterprise clients, with operations expanding into Oceania and Europe. We architect production-grade data platforms, cloud migrations, and AI-integrated analytics.

about.title: Why Partner with isTech?
about.description: We deliver end-to-end data engineering solutions to enterprise clients, spanning Data Warehouses, Data Lakes, and Lakehouses on AWS, Azure, Spark, Kafka, Airflow, and Terraform.

cards.title: Data Platform Architecture
cards.description: Design and build production-grade data platforms: Lakehouses, Data Warehouses, and real-time streaming systems.

cards.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
cards.description: AWS, Azure, and Databricks — migrations, optimization, and IaC with Terraform and Kubernetes.

cards.title: AI & Agentic Systems
cards.description: LLM integration, MCP servers, RAG pipelines, and AI-powered data products on modern data stacks.

cards.title: Enterprise Consulting
cards.description: Data strategy, architecture design, and fractional principal engineering for data-driven organizations.

mission.title: From Data to Decisions
mission.description: We turn raw data into actionable intelligence using cloud-powered pipelines, ML, and real-time dashboards — empowering your teams to make faster, data-driven decisions.

highlights.title: Why Choose isTech?
items: Expert in modern data stack (Spark, Databricks, Kafka, Airflow)
Proven track record at Fortune 500 companies (Nike, Inter&Co)
Active contracts with US enterprise clients
Operations across 6+ timezones with zero delivery friction
Founded by a Senior Data Engineer with hands-on enterprise experience

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.description: Ready to transform your data infrastructure? Reach out and let's discuss your project.
